$schema: Campaign palette manifest — TD-1 §3.7, §4.0. Declares named palettes for Revlon.
$note: Phase A placeholder. Brand owner authors palettes; marketers reference by name. Palette-eligible tokens only — layout, spacing, decorative.* are excluded.

base.$description: Default Revlon palette — matches brand tokens exactly. Used as reference.

holiday-red-green.$description: Holiday campaign — red primary shifts to warm crimson, green accent.

summer-glow.$description: Summer campaign — warm coral primary, golden accent.
